name: Wasabi-Ginger Butter
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Butter unsalted, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix water and wasabi powder in a small bowl and let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Chop the gingerroot.
3. Add the butter to the mixture and process until creamy.
4. Add the wasabi paste, lemon juice, and salt, then process until smooth.
5. Scrape all the mixture onto a sheet of waxed paper.
6. Shape the mixture into a small log about 2 inches long.
7. Refrigerate until firm.
8. To serve, cut into 1/4 inch sections and melt over hot fish or beef.
9. The butter will keep several days if refrigerated. It makes about 1/4 cup, enough for 8 servings.
10. Serve over grilled fish or beef. The green color is particularly attractive on salmon.
